description: Angular build targets from angular.json should be recognized as entrypoints

expectations.subject: src/main.ts
expectations.note: Angular main entry -- referenced in angular.json build target

expectations.subject: src/polyfills.ts
expectations.note: Angular polyfills -- referenced in angular.json build target

expectations.subject: src/unused.ts
expectations.note: File not referenced by Angular build config -- should be flagged
